expectations.text: WebApp participant is declared with `#AED6F1` background-color suffix on the declaration line (e.g., `participant WebApp #AED6F1` or `participant "Web App" as WebApp #AED6F1`)
expectations.evidence: participant WebApp #AED6F1 on declaration line — exact syntax from the new docs

expectations.text: Does NOT use the `;line:` border-color syntax on any sequence participant or note (would produce 'No such color' render error)
AuthService is declared without a color suffix (kept default as requested)
All three participants (User, WebApp, AuthService) are declared explicitly with participant/actor keyword — not inferred from message lines
expectations.evidence: actor User + participant WebApp/AuthService — all explicit

expectations.text: Arrow style is consistent: -> for requests, --> for responses
